c9fcb60d37a0.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
c9fcb60d37a0.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
c9fcb60d37a0.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

e1b7c42040d9.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
e1b7c42040d9.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
e1b7c42040d9.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

0839c2e84266.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
0839c2e84266.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

fcb6b90d36ec.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
fcb6b90d36ec.description: You trail peers by 1.2 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
